Localization.Description: A trust verification function for executable files was modified. Attackers modify the CryptSIPDllGetSignedDataMsg, CryptSIPDllVerifyIndirectData, and FinalPolicy functions to execute malicious payloads on users' computers without being detected.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} modified the function of trust provider {datafield11} responsible for the final result of file trust validation and successfully verified file {datafield15} for trust using process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}

User {subject.account.name} modified the function of trust provider {datafield11} responsible for the final result of file trust validation and received an error when verifying the hash of file {datafield15} using process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} modified the hash verification function for files {datafield11} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} modified the function of trust provider {datafield11} responsible for the final result of executable file trust validation on host {event_src.host}

User {subject.account.name} modified the digital signature verification function for files {datafield11} and received an error when verifying the hash of file {datafield15} using process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}

User {subject.account.name} modified the hash verification function for files {datafield11} and successfully verified file {datafield15} for trust using process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}

User {subject.account.name} modified the hash verification function for files {datafield11} and received an error when verifying the digital signature of file {datafield15} using process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} modified the digital signature verification function for files {datafield11} on host {event_src.host}

User {subject.account.name} modified the digital signature verification function for files {datafield11} and successfully verified file {datafield15} for trust using process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}

User {subject.account.name} modified the digital signature verification function for files {datafield11} and received an error when verifying the digital signature of file {datafield15} using process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}

User {subject.account.name} modified the hash verification function for files {datafield11} and received an error when verifying the hash of file {datafield15} using process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}

User {subject.account.name} modified the function of trust provider {datafield11} responsible for the final result of file trust validation and received an error when verifying the digital signature of file {datafield15} using process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
